message:
fix: null guards on messages, agents, fork, assignments, PVC classification (#6792-#6805) (#6907)

* fix(go): validate forkFullName contains "/" and add upstream default_branch fallback

- #6805: strings.Split(forkFullName, "/")[0] would produce a malformed
  PR head if full_name lacked a "/" separator. Now rejects the response
  early with a clear 502 error.
- #6795: When neither forkData["parent"] nor forkData["default_branch"]
  carry the default branch, query the upstream repo directly instead of
  assuming "main". Prevents 504 retry exhaustion for repos using
  "master", "trunk", etc.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix(ts): add null guards on messages, agents, assignments, and unread IDs

- #6792/#6799: (m.messages ?? []).map() in loadMissions to survive
  corrupted localStorage entries without wiping all mission history.
- #6793: (payload.agents ?? []).map() and local variable for repeated
  access, preventing TypeError when backend sends malformed agents_list.
- #6796: (a.projectNames ?? []).length in canAdvance guard for legacy
  persisted state missing projectNames.
- #6797: (planningMission.messages ?? []).filter() in both useMemo and
  useEffect to handle corrupted messages field after reload.
- #6802: Array.isArray check in loadUnreadMissionIds before
  constructing Set, preventing TypeError on non-iterable parse results.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix(pvc): count only Lost status as failed instead of all non-Bound/non-Pending

#6803: The failed PVC count previously included every status that wasn't
Bound or Pending (e.g. Released, Terminating, Available), inflating the
failure count and causing false alerts. Now only counts status === 'Lost'
which is the actual Kubernetes failure phase for PVCs.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -163,7 +163,7 @@ export function MissionControlDialog({ open, onClose }: MissionControlDialogProp
   const canAdvance =
     (state.phase === 'define' && state.projects.length > 0 && !state.aiStreaming) ||
     (state.phase === 'assign' && (
-      state.assignments.some((a) => a.projectNames.length > 0) ||
+      state.assignments.some((a) => (a.projectNames ?? []).length > 0) ||
       state.targetClusters.length > 0
     )) ||
     state.phase === 'blueprint'
